output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? The 60-Second Fix Frustrated Renters Use
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights, what deductions are illegal, and how to demand your deposit back in 60 seconds.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: Why Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And Hope You Give Up)
Can My Landlord Keep My Deposit? The Illegal Deductions Most Tenants Miss
What To Do When Your Landlord Won't Return Your Deposit: A 3-Step Action Plan
Security Deposit Demand Letter 101: Why This One Document Works Better Than a Lawyer
How to Get Your Deposit Back in 60 Seconds (No Sign-Up, No Subscription, Just $19.99)
key_points: HOOK 1: 'POV: You moved out 30 days ago and your landlord just said they're keeping your $2,000 deposit for 'cleaning'...'
HOOK 2: '3 deductions your landlord thinks they can take (but are actually illegal). Save this before you move out.'
HOOK 3: 'I sent this letter and got my full deposit back in 1 week. No lawyer. No court. Just $19.99.'
HOOK 4: 'If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit in 30 days, they might already owe you double. Here's why.'
TikTok/Reel Script A: Start with text overlay 'My landlord kept my deposit so I did this...' → Show the demand letter being generated → Cut to bank notification of refund.
TikTok/Reel Script B: Green screen of a fake landlord email saying 'We're keeping it for damages' → You pointing to state law text → 'Actually, that's normal wear and tear.'
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord steal your deposit. Generate a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99 — no sign-up, no subscription, no lawyer required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who have moved out and are dealing with a landlord wrongfully withholding or failing to return their security deposit.
